title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: device-mapper-multipath bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for device-mapper-multipath is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The device-mapper-multipath packages provide tools that use the device-mapper multipath kernel module to manage multipath devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): There are many bugs in multipath's persistent reservation handling [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-125288)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

full_text:
An update for device-mapper-multipath is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The device-mapper-multipath packages provide tools that use the device-mapper multipath kernel module to manage multipath devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): There are many bugs in multipath's persistent reservation handling [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-125288)
